summary: Completed testing of Notes feature (mutual follow logic, reactions), Europe spots expansion, and OneSignal integration. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - UserNoteBubble and FeedCreateNoteModal components working correctly on Feed page.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint may not exist or require different auth

critical_code_review_comments: Notes API uses Profile.id (not user_id from auth) - frontend must pass correct ID from login response
OneSignal push notifications are fire-and-forget (asyncio.create_task) - failures won't block API responses

kelly_surf.note: Notes API uses profile_id, not user_id

context_for_next_testing_agent: Notes feature fully implemented with mutual follow logic. Profile.id must be used for notes API (not user_id from auth). Europe spots added: Portugal (30 spots including Supertubos, Nazaré), France (34 spots including La Gravière, Hossegor), Spain (37 spots including Mundaka, El Confital). OneSignal configured with APP_ID and REST_API_KEY in backend/.env.

notes_mutual_follow_logic.GET /api/notes/feed: PASS - Returns own_note, feed, total_count, mutual_follower_count
notes_mutual_follow_logic.mutual_follow_verification: PASS - Only returns notes from users you follow who follow you back

note_reactions.GET /api/notes/{note_id}/reactions: PASS - Returns reactions, emoji_counts, total_count, user_reaction

note_replies.POST /api/notes/{note_id}/reply: PASS - Creates reply and DM conversation (rejects self-reply)

europe_spots.portugal: PASS - 30 spots (Supertubos, Nazaré, Ericeira, Peniche, Algarve)
europe_spots.france: PASS - 34 spots (La Gravière, Hossegor, Biarritz, Brittany)
europe_spots.spain: PASS - 37 spots (Mundaka, El Confital, Zarautz, Canary Islands)

onesignal_integration.service_configured: PASS - APP_ID and REST_API_KEY in backend/.env
onesignal_integration.push_notifications: PASS - Fire-and-forget for note replies and reactions

frontend_ui.UserNoteBubble: PASS - Shows above user avatar on Feed page
frontend_ui.FeedCreateNoteModal: PASS - Opens on click, shows mutual follow messaging
frontend_ui.delete_button: PASS - Delete note button present when note exists
